result.reviewText: We are so thankful to Agnitantra Events and Caterers and especially to our dear Amal chettan. Our engagement and wedding went exactly how we imagined and my family truly enjoyed, stress free! Amal chettan and his team managed and organized our event including stage decor, light and sound, food, transportation and photography (Aira Photography). We got lots of compliments from both sides. I would highly recommend hiring Agnitantra Events.

We had entrusted Agnitantra Events & Caterers with my sister's wedding, and it was one of the best decisions we made. The entire experience was smooth, professional, and completely stress-free, all thanks to Amal Chettan. He's not just an event manager — he's genuinely passionate about what he does. On the financial side too, everything was transparent and the pricing felt very reasonable for the quality of service. And the food — absolutely delicious! Highly recommend.

I highly recommend Aira Photos for anyone looking to capture their special moments with elegance and excellence. Their photography style is truly timeless — every photo feels classic, natural, and full of emotion. The video quality in particular was outstanding — beautifully edited, cinematic, and perfectly captured the essence of our event. We received so many compliments from friends and family. Aira Photos didn't just deliver a service; they gave us something we'll cherish for a lifetime.

We are extremely grateful to Agnitantra for the beautiful decor and excellent catering. Everything was perfectly planned and executed, and it truly exceeded our expectations. A very special mention to Amal chettan, who was there for us like a family member throughout. He took care of even the smallest details with so much dedication and calmness, so we could completely relax and enjoy our special moments without any stress. Thank you, Agnitantra and Amal chettan, for making our day so beautiful and memorable. Highly recommended!

We had the most incredible experience with Agnitantra Events and Caterers by Amal Sebastian for my brother's wedding reception, and we are beyond grateful. From the very first conversation, Amal was an absolute gem — warm, friendly, dependable, and deeply committed. He was the single point of contact and handled catering, decor, transport, lighting, photography coordination, and music with flawless execution. A huge thank you to Amal and his entire team, and a big shoutout to Aira Photography for beautifully capturing all the special moments! We wholeheartedly recommend them to anyone looking for a trustworthy, passionate, and professional team.

We had an absolutely amazing experience with Agnitantra Events! From the initial consultation to the final moments of our functions, their team was professional, attentive, and incredibly detail-oriented. Every element — from the decor and lighting to the timeline and guest management — was perfectly executed. They took all the stress off our shoulders and made our big day truly unforgettable. Highly recommended!

Agnitantra played a major role in making my wedding unforgettable! The company was responsible for bringing together the entire event including transport, event planning, programs and decor. Amal welcomed all our suggestions and incorporated them into ideas of his own. The decor was stunning and made to our liking. Our guests couldn't stop commenting about how beautiful and well-organized the event was. Highly recommend for anyone!

Big huge thank you to Amal anna and team for bringing my dream destination wedding to life. He made it so easy to plan a wedding from a different country and never made us feel hesitant throughout the process. Fair and reasonable prices, amazing delivery and the most hard-working team I have seen thus far. So grateful to have chosen Agnitantra/Aira Events. Highly recommend for those living in and out of Kerala looking for a great team to plan your special events!

Recently my daughter's marriage reception was conducted in Contour Resorts. The entire event management was given to Agnitantra. Mr. Amal and team executed it so beautifully, like my own brother — very reliable and efficient, so my tension and headache were relieved totally. Guests praised the fascinating decorations, charming Madhuramveppu function, mouthwatering food, captivating photography, beautiful dances, friendly hostess and perfect transportation. Thank you Mr. Amal.

Had a really wonderful experience with Agnitantra Events for my wedding. Aira Photography, a sister concern, played a key role in our whole journey from pre-wedding shoot to wedding day — an excellent team of professional photographers and cinematographers, and the results were amazing. All the food provided throughout our functions was delicious, and the events, stage decor and everything else were handled excellently. Hats off to Amal bro for his wonderful work execution.

A friend recommended Agnitantra Event Management for my own wedding ceremony. Due to Amal bro, me and my family didn't have to worry about anything and we enjoyed the wedding planning absolutely with no worries. Agnitantra made our wedding such a beautiful day in our entire life. Thank you Amal bro and team. Recommend to all other people if you are having trouble finding a good event management in Kerala.

Our wedding engagement was a seamless and enchanting experience, all thanks to the Agnitantra event management team. The food was exquisite — our guests are still talking about it — and the photography was beyond our expectations. Every detail was handled with care and professionalism. We are immensely grateful for the wonderful memories you've given us. Highly recommended!

High quality and sincere service. I found them in 2024 while searching for a team to do my wedding arrangements. Being an NRI, my parents and I were very anxious, however once speaking with Amal chetan, I insisted on giving them the work. Two years later, my family are fully satisfied and very happy having given them my brother's wedding and madhuramveppu, and my daughter's baptism. Their approach is very professional yet family-like, which made us comfortable. Food, decor, entertainment, car rental, photography and more — we definitely recommend them for your event management.

I am writing this review from the bottom of my heart because our event was made truly beautiful by Amal ettan and his team at Agnitantra Events and Caterers. When I first contacted him for my marriage event, I used to call him "Amal bro", but gradually it changed to "Amal ettan" because, truly speaking, he became like a brother to me. From the very beginning, whenever I messaged him, he would reply quickly and guide me patiently through every detail. One of the most wonderful things about Agnitantra Events is that once you hand over your function to them, you don't have to worry about anything else. They take care of everything under one roof — their own photography company, Aira Photography, as well as catering services and much more. The photographers and cinematographers are highly professional, experienced, and very friendly. And the food was simply amazing! I wholeheartedly recommend Agnitantra Events and Caterers by Amal Sebastian to everyone.

We had the pleasure of choosing Agnitantra Caters for three different occasions, and every experience was outstanding. The food was absolutely delicious each time — rich in flavor, perfectly cooked, and beautifully presented. What truly makes them special is the service: punctual, well-organized, and very attentive throughout. A heartfelt appreciation to the owner, Amal bro, who is incredibly friendly, humble, and easy to work with. We highly recommend them to anyone looking for exceptional food and excellent service.
